messages.en: The cat fell asleep. You should rest too 🐾
What color was your day today?

messages.ko: 잠시 폰을 내려놓고, 진짜 당신의 삶을 돌보세요.
messages.en: Put down your phone and tend to your real life.
It's okay to be stuck. The cat will wait for you.

messages.ko: 고양이가 TV 보다 잠드는 동안, 당신도 쉬어가세요 🐾
messages.en: While the cat falls asleep watching TV, you rest too 🐾
